title: Allow changing behaviour of external tools toolstrip
author: farosch
body_snippet:
## Current Behavior
When clicking on a an external tools button in the menu strip it uses the currently selected machine in the connection tree.

## Possible Solution
Implement a settings option to chose weather to use the currently active connection tab or the selected connection in the connection tree.


## Your Environment
<!--- Include as many relevant details about the environment you experienced the bug in -->
* Version used: Current develop branch
* Operating System and version:...

iterations.description: Feature request to add a setting for external tools to use active connection tab instead of selected tree node

comments.author: farosch
comments.snippet: @sparerd @kmscode If you want me to, I'll create a PR for this

comments.author: kmscode
comments.snippet: Assigned to @farosch - would love a PR for this. Thanks!!

notes:
AI triage (claude): Feature request to add a setting for external tools to use active connection tab instead of selected tree node
Approach: Add a setting (e.g. ExternalToolsUseActiveTab) that toggles TsExtAppEntry_Click between SelectedNode (tree) and active ConnectionWindow tab. Wire setting through SettingsLoader/SettingsSaver.
